description: somo.social event page (React/Next.js): title, start/end and description come from the page's schema.org JSON-LD Event, and the fuller venue address is taken from the DOM.

events.title: anecdotes presents: Advanced AI for Engineers
events.details:
https://somo.social/en/e/anecdotes-presents-advanced-727

Join us for an enlightening tech meetup on Advanced AI for Engineers! 🚀 Dive deep into the future of artificial intelligence with industry experts:

Alon Elishkov Harel - Core & AI Team Lead at Anecdotes
Asaf Salomon - Senior AI Innovation at Anecdotes
Sahar Carmel - Director of AI Enablement, founder of GetCandleKeep & Squid Club

Don't miss this chance to expand your knowledge and network with fellow engineers in a vibrant atmosphere. 💡🤝
For tickets and more details, visit here!

times.location: בית ויקטוריה, המלאכה 3, תל אביב-יפו, Israel
